faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about AI agent security

questions.question: What is AI agent security?
questions.answer: AI agent security involves protecting AI systems, their data, and infrastructure from unauthorized access, attacks, and vulnerabilities. This includes securing API keys, authentication mechanisms, communication channels, and the data processed by AI systems.

questions.question: How does the 30-second security assessment work?
questions.answer: Our automated security assessment scans your AI infrastructure for common vulnerabilities, misconfigurations, and compliance issues. It analyzes your setup, identifies risks, and provides a comprehensive Claw Score with actionable recommendations for improvement.

questions.question: What platforms and technologies do you support?
questions.answer: ClawGuru supports all major cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, Azure), container technologies (Docker, Kubernetes), programming languages, and AI frameworks. We provide security solutions for self-hosted and cloud-based AI deployments.

questions.question: What is the Mycelium Network?
questions.answer: The Mycelium Network is our distributed security intelligence system that allows organizations to share threat information and security insights across their infrastructure. It creates a collaborative defense network that benefits all participants.

questions.question: How do the security runbooks work?
questions.answer: Our AI generates 4.2 million+ security runbooks that provide step-by-step guidance for addressing specific security issues. Each runbook is tailored to your technology stack and includes detailed implementation steps, code examples, and best practices.

questions.question: Is my data secure with ClawGuru?
questions.answer: Yes, we use enterprise-grade encryption, zero-trust architecture, and comply with major security standards including GDPR, SOC 2, and ISO 27001. Your data is never shared with third parties and you maintain full control over your security information.
